diff:
diff --git a/src/history.py b/src/history.py
index 8ec6ea8..84a494a 100644
--- a/src/history.py
+++ b/src/history.py
@@ -3,9 +3,11 @@ def recent_unique(items, limit):
         return []
     seen = set()
     result = []
-    for item in items:
-        if item in seen:
-            continue
-        seen.add(item)
-        result.append(item)
-    return result[-limit:]
+    for item in reversed(items):
+        if item not in seen:
+            seen.add(item)
+            result.append(item)
+        if len(result) == limit:
+            break
+    result.reverse()
+    return result
